doctor.name: Dr. MaAn

bio: Dr. MaAn is Odisha's foremost implantologist, combining surgical precision with an artist's eye for aesthetics. Trained at [Institution], with advanced fellowship in implantology from FICOI, she has transformed over 5,000 smiles across Bhubaneswar and beyond.

Her philosophy is simple: every patient deserves to leave the clinic more confident than when they arrived. At Dr. MaAn's clinic, that begins with listening — and ends with a smile that's engineered to last a lifetime.
credentials: FICOI - Fellow, International Congress of Oral Implantologists
doctor.pullQuote: "I don't just treat teeth. I restore confidence — one smile at a time."
